key_findings: False positive rate: 100% (10/10 fail stability + physics gates)
All 9 CuO2/LiH superlattices fail stability: CuO2 planes need charge reservoir layers
LaCuO1.25H1.75 perovskite is the only marginal survivor (E_hull ~62 meV/atom)
No candidate reaches Phase 58 target zone (lambda >= 2.5, omega_log >= 700 K)
Best combined Tc estimate: 155 K (far below 300 K)
Surrogate model is not useful for finding 300 K candidates in this composition space
Root cause: physics-estimated lambda and omega_log for H-oxides don't reach target zone

backtracking_assessment.trigger: All 10 hits fail omega_log > 800 K gate; only 1 marginally passes stability
backtracking_assessment.conclusion: Surrogate is not useful for this problem at current scope
backtracking_assessment.recommendation: Rely on Track B candidates (Phases 59-62) for final ranking
